title: The $221K Phone Upgrade Trap Nobody Talks About
hook: You upgrade your phone every 22 months — and nobody's done the math on what that's actually costing you at retirement.
angle: The opportunity cost of habitual phone upgrades vs. investing the difference, resulting in a quarter-million-dollar retirement gap most people never see coming.
audience: Smartphone users ages 20-45 who upgrade phones on a regular cycle without questioning it
key_numbers: 22 months — average time between US phone upgrades
75% of people upgrade before their phone stops working
$221,000 — what $500/year invested at 10% for 40 years becomes
